message:
test(core): E2E high-frequency spam & entropy load shedding (ft-344j8.12)

8 integration tests proving the semantic anomaly pipeline survives
spam storms without blocking:

1. 100k low-entropy spam segments at max rate — zero-hitch verified
2. Mixed load (90% spam, 10% real data) — entropy gate filters spam
3. 4-thread concurrent multi-pane spam — shedding under pressure
4. Shutdown under active load — no deadlocks
5. Metrics accounting consistency invariants
6. Entropy gate effectiveness for single-byte patterns
7. EventBus integration under load
8. ShockResponder integration under spam

All tests verify: observe_segment() never blocks, entropy gate filters
>50% of low-entropy data, metrics invariants hold, clean shutdown.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
